---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the problem?

<!-- What can't you do today, or what's awkward? Focus on the use case, not
     the implementation. -->

## What would the behavior look like?

<!-- Describe the user-facing change. Wireframes or a word-picture are both
     fine. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any workarounds you already tried, or approaches you considered but
     rejected? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Data sources this would need, rough complexity estimate, etc. -->
